summary.key_theme: 比特幣價格持續下探導致市場情緒轉趨悲觀，投資人面臨顯著帳面虧損，儘管 IBIT 在費用結構上仍具備相對於期貨 ETF 與 MicroStrategy 的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Stop Paying a 10% Premium for Bitcoin: Why IBIT Beats MSTR
bullish.reason: 強調 IBIT 作為現貨 ETF 在持有成本上優於 MicroStrategy (MSTR) 的溢價結構，對長期投資人具備成本效益優勢。

bullish.title: IBIT: Bitcoin Is Likely In The Final Few Months Of The Bear Market (Rating Upgrade)
bullish.reason: 分析師給予評級上調，認為市場已接近熊市尾聲，為長期持有者提供進場契機。

bullish.title: BITO’s 0.95% Fee Is Only Half the Problem. Here’s Why Bitcoin Futures Cost You 2.9% Annually
bullish.reason: 透過比較期貨 ETF (BITO) 的高昂持有成本，間接凸顯 IBIT 現貨 ETF 的費用優勢。

bearish.title: Crypto Market Today, June 25: Crypto Selloff Deepens as Bitcoin Hits Multi-Year Low
bearish.reason: 比特幣價格跌至多年新低，直接導致追蹤比特幣價格的 IBIT 淨值面臨巨大下行壓力。

bearish.title: After Bitcoin's Collapse, The Average IBIT Investor Has Swung From A 30% Gain To A 40% Loss, Analyst Says
bearish.reason: 報導指出投資人帳面損益由盈轉虧，顯示市場信心潰散，可能引發進一步的恐慌性拋售。

bearish.title: Shares of crypto-linked stocks are trading lower amid a continued selloff as Bitcoin prices drop.
bearish.reason: 反映加密貨幣相關資產的連動性下跌，IBIT 作為直接曝險工具，受整體市場賣壓影響顯著。

bearish.title: Wall Street Bets Against Bitcoin As Price Nears Two-Year Low
bearish.reason: 華爾街機構看空情緒升溫，加劇了比特幣及其相關 ETF 的下行趨勢。

bearish.title: MSTR Nears Make-Or-Break Price as Saylor Hints at Buying More Bitcoin
bearish.reason: 雖然討論重點為 MSTR，但其股價波動與比特幣價格高度相關，反映出加密貨幣板塊整體疲軟。

neutral.title: Three Inflation Protection Strategies Better Than Gold — Gold, GDX, TIPS (LTPZ), Bitcoin (IBIT), and energy (XLE) outlook
neutral.reason: 將 IBIT 納入抗通膨資產組合進行比較，未對短期價格走勢做出明確多空判斷。

neutral.title: The Bitcoin Mining ETF That Returned 52% in One Week, And Most Income Investors Have Never Heard of It
neutral.reason: 報導聚焦於其他礦業 ETF，與 IBIT 本身關聯度較低，僅作為市場背景參考。
